question: Which exact file formats and layout variants can each bank and each of the three initial accounts export?
context: Resolved by a privacy-safe throwaway spike over all three private local fixtures. The initial supported scope is bounded to the detected PDF variants; no raw filenames, identifiers, rows, balances, amounts, or descriptions are retained in the graph.
decision: The initial supported evidence set is three text-native PDFs covering two layout variants. Tabular exports remain unsupported until separately qualified with real fixtures.
